jasperReport.name: OrdenesCompraLocales
jasperReport.queryString:
select Em.Edescripcion, Dir.direccion1, Dir.codPostal, Emp.Etelefono1, Emp.Efax, EO.EOnumero, EO.EOfecha, EO.EOtotal, EO.EOplazo, SNC.SNCnombre, SNC.SNCfax, SNC.SNCtelefono, DO.DOconsecutivo, case CMtipo when 'A' then ltrim(rtrim(f.Acodigo))||'-'||Adescripcion when 'S' then ltrim(rtrim(h.Ccodigo ))||'-'||Cdescripcion when 'F' then ltrim(rtrim(k.ACcodigodesc))||'-'||j.ACdescripcion||'/'||k.ACdescripcion end as item, DO.Ucodigo, DO.DOcantidad, DO.DOpreciou, DO.DOtotal, DO.DOfechareq, Mo.Mnombre, Sn.SNidentificacion, Sn.SNnombre, Sn.SNtelefono, Sn.SNdireccion, Sn.SNcodigo, Sn.SNnumero, DSC.DSconsecutivo, DSC.ESnumero
from EOrdenCM EO
inner join DOrdenCM DO on EO.Ecodigo = DO.Ecodigo and EO.EOidorden = DO.EOidorden
-- Articulos left outer join Articulos f on DO.Aid=f.Aid and DO.Ecodigo=f.Ecodigo and f.Ecodigo=$P{Ecodigo}
-- Conceptos left outer join Conceptos h on DO.Cid=h.Cid and DO.Ecodigo=h.Ecodigo and h.Ecodigo=$P{Ecodigo}
-- Activos left outer join ACategoria j on DO.ACcodigo=j.ACcodigo and DO.Ecodigo=j.Ecodigo
left outer join AClasificacion k on DO.ACcodigo=k.ACcodigo and DO.ACid=k.ACid and DO.Ecodigo=k.Ecodigo
left outer join DSolicitudCompraCM DSC on DO.Ecodigo = DSC.Ecodigo and DO.DSlinea = DSC.DSlinea
inner join Monedas Mo on EO.Ecodigo = Mo.Ecodigo and EO.Mcodigo = Mo.Mcodigo
inner join SNegocios Sn on EO.Ecodigo = Sn.Ecodigo and EO.SNcodigo = Sn.SNcodigo
left outer join SNContactos SNC on Sn.SNcodigo = SNC.SNcodigo and Sn.Ecodigo = SNC.Ecodigo
inner join Empresas Em on EO.Ecodigo = Em.Ecodigo
inner join Empresa Emp on Em.EcodigoSDC=Emp.Ecodigo
inner join Direcciones Dir on Emp.id_direccion=Dir.id_direccion
where EO.Ecodigo=$P{Ecodigo} and EO.EOnumero =$P{EOnumero} order by EO.EOnumero,DO.DOconsecutivo

staticText.text: Consign and airmall documents to (Consignar y enviar documentos por vía aérea a):
Please refer to the above number in all invoices and correspondence Favor referirse al número arriba indicado en las Facturas

Important Instructions: Commercial invoices must be in SPANISH and FOUR copies showing net and gross weights and SIGNED by shippers. The following legend must appear: Declaramos bajo juramento que los precios y detalles de esta factura son verdaderos: Two original copies of Bill of Landing but no consultar invoices needed DO NOT INSURE, we are covered under a floating policy in our country. COPIA - NO - NEGOCIABLE
